name: hep-ph-toolkit
description: All-in-one toolkit for high-energy physics phenomenology — Feynman diagrams, one-loop amplitudes (FeynArts/FormCalc/LoopTools), BSM model building (FeynRules/SARAH/SPheno), dark-matter constraints (DDCalc/HiggsTools/GamLike/micrOMEGAs/DRAKE), Monte Carlo event generation (MadGraph/MadDM), linear cosmology for BSM constraints (CLASS: CMB Cℓ, P(k), background, transfer functions via cosmology/v1 schema), publication plotting, plus workflow skills for model-to-tool routing and analytic-exception detection. Collider analysis, RGE running, parton-shower configuration, ROOT analysis, statistical inference, LaTeX paper drafting, and arXiv/literature search are on the roadmap.
